mapper.select:
select t1.id , t1.zcdj , t1.last_update_date , t1.cjgzrq , t1.szbm , t1.csd , t1.jrbdwsj , t1.whcd , t1.rylb , t1.created_dept , t1.sfqy , t1.last_update_ip , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.sfzh , t1.jylb , t1.creation_date , t1.jtzz , t1.jndj , t1.zc , t1.xb , t1.jtygbm , t1.mz , t1.sflb , t1.csrq , t1.szgw , t1.rybm , t1.xm , t1.yjbm , t1.version , t1.org_identity , t1.jg , t1.nl , t1.ryid from dyn_mdm_ry t1
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.ZCDJ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.zcdj}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.CJGZRQ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.cjgzrq}),'%')
and t1.SZBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.szbm}),'%')
and t1.CSD like concat(concat('%',#{bean.csd}),'%')
and t1.JRBDWSJ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jrbdwsj}),'%')
and t1.WHCD like concat(concat('%',#{bean.whcd}),'%')
and t1.RYLB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rylb}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.SFQY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.sfqy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.SFZH like concat(concat('%',#{bean.sfzh}),'%')
and t1.JYLB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jylb}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.JTZZ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jtzz}),'%')
and t1.JNDJ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jndj}),'%')
and t1.ZC like concat(concat('%',#{bean.zc}),'%')
and t1.XB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.xb}),'%')
and t1.JTYGBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jtygbm}),'%')
and t1.MZ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.mz}),'%')
and t1.SFLB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.sflb}),'%')
and t1.CSRQ >= #{bean.csrqBegin}
and t1.CSRQ <= #{bean.csrqEnd}
and t1.SZGW like concat(concat('%',#{bean.szgw}),'%')
and t1.RYBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rybm}),'%')
and t1.XM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.xm}),'%')
and t1.YJBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.yjbm}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.JG like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jg}),'%')
and t1.NL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.nl}),'%')
and t1.RYID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ryid}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.zcdj , t1.last_update_date , t1.cjgzrq , t1.szbm , t1.csd , t1.jrbdwsj , t1.whcd , t1.rylb , t1.created_dept , t1.sfqy , t1.last_update_ip , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.sfzh , t1.jylb , t1.creation_date , t1.jtzz , t1.jndj , t1.zc , t1.xb , t1.jtygbm , t1.mz , t1.sflb , t1.csrq , t1.szgw , t1.rybm , t1.xm , t1.yjbm , t1.version , t1.org_identity , t1.jg , t1.nl , t1.ryid from dyn_mdm_ry t1
or t1.ID =#{bean.id}
or t1.ZCDJ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.zcdj}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
or t1.CJGZRQ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.cjgzrq}),'%')
or t1.SZBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.szbm}),'%')
or t1.CSD like concat(concat('%',#{bean.csd}),'%')
or t1.JRBDWSJ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jrbdwsj}),'%')
or t1.WHCD like concat(concat('%',#{bean.whcd}),'%')
or t1.RYLB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rylb}),'%')
or t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
or t1.SFQY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.sfqy}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
or t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
or t1.SFZH like concat(concat('%',#{bean.sfzh}),'%')
or t1.JYLB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jylb}),'%')
or t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
or t1.JTZZ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jtzz}),'%')
or t1.JNDJ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jndj}),'%')
or t1.ZC like concat(concat('%',#{bean.zc}),'%')
or t1.XB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.xb}),'%')
or t1.JTYGBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jtygbm}),'%')
or t1.MZ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.mz}),'%')
or t1.SFLB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.sflb}),'%')
or t1.CSRQ >= #{bean.csrqBegin}
or t1.CSRQ <= #{bean.csrqEnd}
or t1.SZGW like concat(concat('%',#{bean.szgw}),'%')
or t1.RYBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rybm}),'%')
or t1.XM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.xm}),'%')
or t1.YJBM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.yjbm}),'%')
or t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
or t1.JG like concat(concat('%',#{bean.jg}),'%')
or t1.NL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.nl}),'%')
or t1.RYID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ryid}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.zcdj , t1.last_update_date , t1.cjgzrq , t1.szbm , t1.csd , t1.jrbdwsj , t1.whcd , t1.rylb , t1.created_dept , t1.sfqy , t1.last_update_ip , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.sfzh , t1.jylb , t1.creation_date , t1.jtzz , t1.jndj , t1.zc , t1.xb , t1.jtygbm , t1.mz , t1.sflb , t1.csrq , t1.szgw , t1.rybm , t1.xm , t1.yjbm , t1.version , t1.org_identity , t1.jg , t1.nl , t1.ryid from dyn_mdm_ry t1 where t1.id = #{id}

select t1.id , t1.zcdj , t1.last_update_date , t1.cjgzrq , t1.szbm , t1.csd , t1.jrbdwsj , t1.whcd , t1.rylb , t1.created_dept , t1.sfqy , t1.last_update_ip , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.sfzh , t1.jylb , t1.creation_date , t1.jtzz , t1.jndj , t1.zc , t1.xb , t1.jtygbm , t1.mz , t1.sflb , t1.csrq , t1.szgw , t1.rybm , t1.xm , t1.yjbm , t1.version , t1.org_identity , t1.jg , t1.nl , t1.ryid from dyn_mdm_ry t1 where t1.ryid = #{ryId}
mapper.insert:
insert into dyn_mdm_ry
id,
zcdj,
last_update_date,
cjgzrq,
szbm,
csd,
jrbdwsj,
whcd,
rylb,
created_dept,
sfqy,
last_update_ip,
created_by,
last_updated_by,
sfzh,
jylb,
creation_date,
jtzz,
jndj,
zc,
xb,
jtygbm,
mz,
sflb,
csrq,
szgw,
rybm,
xm,
yjbm,
version,
org_identity,
jg,
nl,
ryid,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zcdj,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{cjgzrq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{csd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jrbdwsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{whcd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sfqy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{jtzz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jndj,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{xb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jtygbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sflb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{csrq,jdbcType=DATE},
#{szgw,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rybm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{yjbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nl,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{ryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

insert into dyn_mdm_ry( id, zcdj, last_update_date, cjgzrq, szbm, csd, jrbdwsj, whcd, rylb, created_dept, sfqy, last_update_ip, created_by, last_updated_by, sfzh, jylb, creation_date, jtzz, jndj, zc, xb, jtygbm, mz, sflb, csrq, szgw, rybm, xm, yjbm, version, org_identity, jg, nl, ryid)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.zcdj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, #{item.cjgzrq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.csd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jrbdwsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.whcd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sfqy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creationDate}, #{item.jtzz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jndj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.zc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.xb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jtygbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.mz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sflb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.csrq,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.szgw,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rybm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.yjbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nl,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.ryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update dyn_mdm_ry
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zcdj =#{zcdj,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
cjgzrq =#{cjgzrq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
szbm =#{szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
csd =#{csd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jrbdwsj =#{jrbdwsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
whcd =#{whcd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rylb =#{rylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sfqy =#{sfqy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sfzh =#{sfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jylb =#{jylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
jtzz =#{jtzz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jndj =#{jndj,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zc =#{zc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
xb =#{xb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jtygbm =#{jtygbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mz =#{mz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sflb =#{sflb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
csrq =#{csrq,jdbcType=DATE},
szgw =#{szgw,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rybm =#{rybm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
xm =#{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yjbm =#{yjbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jg =#{jg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nl =#{nl,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ryid =#{ryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update dyn_mdm_ry set id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zcdj =#{zcdj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate}, cjgzrq =#{cjgzrq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, szbm =#{szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, csd =#{csd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jrbdwsj =#{jrbdwsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, whcd =#{whcd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rylb =#{rylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sfqy =#{sfqy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sfzh =#{sfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jylb =#{jylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{creationDate}, jtzz =#{jtzz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jndj =#{jndj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zc =#{zc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xb =#{xb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jtygbm =#{jtygbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mz =#{mz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sflb =#{sflb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, csrq =#{csrq,jdbcType=DATE}, szgw =#{szgw,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rybm =#{rybm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xm =#{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yjbm =#{yjbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jg =#{jg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nl =#{nl,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ryid =#{ryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update.foreach: update dyn_mdm_ry set id =#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zcdj =#{item.zcdj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{item.lastUpdateDate}, cjgzrq =#{item.cjgzrq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, szbm =#{item.szbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, csd =#{item.csd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jrbdwsj =#{item.jrbdwsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, whcd =#{item.whcd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rylb =#{item.rylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_dept =#{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sfqy =#{item.sfqy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_ip =#{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_updated_by =#{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sfzh =#{item.sfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jylb =#{item.jylb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{item.creationDate}, jtzz =#{item.jtzz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jndj =#{item.jndj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zc =#{item.zc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xb =#{item.xb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jtygbm =#{item.jtygbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mz =#{item.mz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sflb =#{item.sflb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, csrq =#{item.csrq,jdbcType=DATE}, szgw =#{item.szgw,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rybm =#{item.rybm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xm =#{item.xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yjbm =#{item.yjbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, org_identity =#{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jg =#{item.jg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nl =#{item.nl,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ryid =#{item.ryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version =#{item.version};

mapper.select: select t1.id , t1.zcdj , t1.last_update_date , t1.cjgzrq , t1.szbm , t1.csd , t1.jrbdwsj , t1.whcd , t1.rylb , t1.created_dept , t1.sfqy , t1.last_update_ip , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.sfzh , t1.jylb , t1.creation_date , t1.jtzz , t1.jndj , t1.zc , t1.xb , t1.jtygbm , t1.mz , t1.sflb , t1.csrq , t1.szgw , t1.rybm , t1.xm , t1.yjbm , t1.version , t1.org_identity , t1.jg , t1.nl , t1.ryid from dyn_mdm_ry t1 where t1.jtygbm = #{code}
